name: com.pulsemcp/gmail
description: MCP server for Gmail with OAuth2 (personal) and service account (Workspace) support.

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 client ID from Google Cloud Console (for personal Gmail accounts).

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 client secret from Google Cloud Console.

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Refresh token from the OAuth2 setup script.

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_CLIENT_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Service account email address (for Google Workspace).

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Service account private key in PEM format (for Google Workspace).

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_IMPERSONATE_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Email address to impersonate (required for service account mode).

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_ENABLED_TOOLGROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tool groups to enable (readonly, readwrite, readwrite_external).
